name: cc-mini
description: A distributed real-time collaborative whiteboard built with RAFT consensus protocol. Multiple users can draw simultaneously, and all strokes are synchronized via a RAFT cluster with automatic leader election and crash recovery.

scripts.dev:replica1: cross-env ID=node1 PORT=5001 nodemon --watch replica --ext js,json replica/server.js
scripts.dev:replica2: cross-env ID=node2 PORT=5002 nodemon --watch replica --ext js,json replica/server.js
scripts.dev:replica3: cross-env ID=node3 PORT=5003 nodemon --watch replica --ext js,json replica/server.js
